title: Cyclone Narelle upgraded to Category Four as it bears down on WA
description: Cyclone Narelle has been upgraded to a Category Four system as it moves along Western Australia's Pilbara coast, with wind gusts reaching 150 kilometres per hour and warnings it could intensify to Category Five. #narelle #cyclone #wind

title: Cyclone Narelle intensifies to Category 4, threatening WA coast | 7NEWS
description: Severe Tropical Cyclone Narelle has intensified to a Category 4 system with wind gusts of 250 kilometres per hour, threatening Western Australia's Pilbara and Gascoyne coastlines. The massive storm has already impacted Karratha, Wickham and Dampier, with Exmouth and Carnarvon now in lockdown awaiting direct hits. Perth faces supercharged rain bands bringing up to 100 millimetres of rainfall over two days, five times the March monthly average, with flash flooding warnings in place. title: Toddler survives shocking car impact in Balga | 7NEWS
description: An 18-month-old boy survived being struck by an SUV on Princess Road in Balga, with the impact captured on security cameras. The toddler was flung metres down the road before being rushed to Perth Children's Hospital with serious but non-life-threatening injuries, including grazes and a potential head injury. The male driver in his 30s stopped immediately to help and is cooperating with police.
